---
id: eth-get-block-transaction-count-by-number
title: "Returns the number of transactions in a block from a block matching the given block number."
description: "**`eth_getBlockTransactionCountByNumber`** - Returns the number of transactions in a block from a block matching the given block number."

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Returns the number of transactions in a block from a block matching the given block number."}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/eth_getBlockTransactionCountByNumber"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



**`eth_getBlockTransactionCountByNumber`** - Returns the number of transactions in a block from a block matching the given block number.

Send a **JSON-RPC 2.0** request (`jsonrpc`, `method`, `params`, `id`) as in the example below.

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={undefined}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={{"required":true,"content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","required":["jsonrpc","method","params","id"],"properties":{"jsonrpc":{"type":"string","enum":["2.0"]},"method":{"type":"string","enum":["eth_getBlockTransactionCountByNumber"]},"params":{"type":"array","description":"Ordered JSON array of positional parameters for this method.","minItems":1,"maxItems":1,"items":{"oneOf":[{"title":"blockNumberOrTag","oneOf":[{"title":"blockNumberHex","type":"string","description":"The hex representation of the block's height","pattern":"^0x[a-fA-F0-9]+$"},{"title":"blockNumberTag","type":"string","description":"A fixed tag describing block height, check options below.","enum":["earliest","latest","pending"]}]}]}},"id":{"oneOf":[{"type":"integer"},{"type":"string"}],"example":1}}},"example":{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"eth_getBlockTransactionCountByNumber","params":["0x2e5e54"],"id":1}}}}}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"200":{"description":"Successful JSON-RPC 2.0 response over HTTP. The return value is in `result`. On failure, nodes typically still respond with HTTP 200 and an `error` object instead of `result`.","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","required":["jsonrpc","id","result"],"properties":{"jsonrpc":{"type":"string","enum":["2.0"]},"id":{"oneOf":[{"type":"integer"},{"type":"string"}]},"result":{"title":"integer hex","type":"string","pattern":"^0x[a-fA-F0-9]+$","description":"Hex representation of the integer"}}},"example":{"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":1,"result":"0x2"}}}}}}
>
  
</StatusCodes>
